content.en:
After entering this strange place, a black aura permeated the air, trying to erode Ye Tian's origin.

At this time, the leaves protected them, so that these black breaths could not invade.

But the leaves are obviously withering little by little, and it is obvious that they will not be able to last for a long time.

Then.

Ye Tian took out another piece of roulette, if the Dao Strange Thing didn't come, he could use this thing to sense the location of the Dao Strange Thing, and take the initiative to find the Dao Strange Thing.

They have limited time and cannot afford to waste it on the road to find the odds.

"The strange thing is coming!"

Ye Tian's roulette sensed it, and immediately put it away, and many sixfold Dao realms were ready to do it at any time.

In a flash.

An incomparably terrifying figure appeared in the perception of many Sixfold Dao Realms.

It was a sword, held by a strange figure, and the power of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules was permeated with it.

Even though Ye Tian comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the Ten Percent Realm, he still felt that the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were too terrifying.

As for the other sixfold supreme dao realms, they had only comprehended the seventh sequence of supreme dao rules, and had not yet comprehended the sixth sequence supreme dao rules, and they were trembling all over their bodies when they perceived the fifth sequence supreme dao rules.

The difference in strength is too big!

If they encounter such a strange thing alone, they will all be killed in seconds.

Ye Tian took out the Zhenyu Dao Monument, and many Dao Realms urged this treasure to suppress this Dao Treasure.

Rumble!!!!

This area was shrouded in the town to the Dao Monument, and the aura of that Dao Strange Thing also began to decline, from the Ninth Rank to the Dao Realm to the Eightfold Dao Realm.

But no matter how it falls, the other party still uses the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and the combat power is still extremely terrifying.

Rumble!!!!!

The two sides collided.

Many Sixfold Supreme Dao Realms united to collide with this Supreme Dao Strange Thing, and Ye Tian was the first to collide with this Supreme Dao Strange Object, casting the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules of the Ten Percent Realm.

Bang!

Many Supreme Dao Realms were shaken away, and many Supreme Dao Realms were already injured.

You must know that the strength of each of them has reached the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, and a few have even reached the level of the top Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, but together they are not the opponent of this Supreme Dao Strange Thing.

If it weren't for Ye Tian taking the initiative to resist most of the attacks, it is estimated that he would have to die at least a few Eightfold Dao Realm this time.

"The sixth sequence of the Perfection Realm's Supreme Dao Rules, how is this possible?"

The Taibai Sword Lord was shocked by Ye Tian's strength, this is too exaggerated, how did he do it?

Even if you don't care about the origin and refine the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone, it is impossible to do it, there are so many origins, even if you scrap the body, you can't refine many Purple Ruin Devouring Stones!

"Ye Tian estimates that there are other big opportunities!"

The Taibai Sword Lord said enviously.

"All of you have used the supreme powers of suppression, imprisonment and bondage, to assist me!"

Ye Tian ordered.

Some of the strength of the Sixfold Dao Realm is not good, and the attack falls on this Dao Strange Thing, just like tickling, instead of attacking, it is better to restrain and suppress the strength of the Dao Strange Thing, and fight to assist, which will help more.

"Yes!"

The other sixfold supreme dao realms have all used the supreme dao supernatural powers of the restraint and confinement type.

In an instant, the strength of this Dao Strange Thing was suppressed, and its speed and strength decreased a lot.

However.

Ye Tian's consummation sixth sequence of supreme rules and the opponent's fifth sequence supreme rules were still crushed by the other party.

When the opponent slashed with a sword, Ye Tian's defense would be penetrated, and he could only dodge.

Fortunately, the strength of the Dao Strange Thing was suppressed, and the speed was very slow, not as good as Ye Tian.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian used the Dao Extreme Spear Technique, and the dense marksmanship shrouded the Dao Strange Thing, and with his attack power, it also caused injuries to this Dao Strange Thing.

Time passed slowly, and cracks appeared on the body of the Zhidao strange things, but there were also more and more Zhidao Realm serious injuries and had no choice but to withdraw from the battlefield.

After a long time, the injuries of the Zhidao strange thing became more and more serious, and there were more and more cracks.

"Almost, one by one, burst out of the hole cards, and attack the strange things with all your might!"

Ye Tian shouted.

Rumble!!!!

Many Supreme Dao realms began to fight desperately.

The dense attack covered the strange things of the Dao, and the time and space were shattered I don't know how many times, and there were countless times in every moment when the time and space were shattered, and everything was silent.

After rounds of attacks, the strange thing was almost shattered.

The final blow.

Ye Tian wrapped his whole body with the sixth sequence of Dao rules, and turned into a gun, directly penetrating the Dao Strange Things.

Click!

The sword shattered completely, turning into pieces.

And Ye Tian grabbed the core fragment that contained the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, which was the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item that the Sioux people needed.

"Good stuff!"

He couldn't wait to immediately comprehend the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules here, but this was an item that the Sioux needed, and he didn't have the strength to resist the Sioux yet.

He can not be afraid of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, with the Innate Origin Domain Alliance in front of him, the Supreme Dao Void Demon will not be able to enter the Infinite Domain and kill all his copied bodies.

However, the Sioux can do it.

They forcibly entered the Infinite Domain, and even the Origin Realm would be destroyed by them.

Therefore, he didn't want to become mortal enemies with the Sioux for the sake of this fifth-order supreme rule item.

"There is still a little time, while this leaf is not exhausted, take as many treasures as you can find. "

Ye Tian said.

The Sioux did not say it explicitly, but the resources they found naturally belonged to them.

The other Dao realms nodded their heads one after another, and immediately began to disperse to find treasure resources.

If you come in, you can't waste this opportunity!

And after the other Dao realms left, Ye Tian smiled.

"You're gone, so I can condense the second copy body!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Immediately, he began to condense his true body and copy his body.

Soon.

A real body copy body successfully condensed, and then quickly escaped.

In the next time, these Supreme Dao Realms frantically collected resources, the creatures here are not very powerful, and the real threat is the Supreme Dao Strange Thing, and the Supreme Dao Strange Thing is killed, so naturally it can't stop them.

And Ye Tian is also looking for resources, and he really found good things.

"Xuangu real gold, the material for refining the Eight Patterns to Dao weapons, a good thing!"

"The Taixue Dao Flower can improve the cultivation of the Eightfold Dao Realm, it is also a good thing, it will help me!

One treasure after another was found by Ye Tian.

But soon, time was running out, and the leaf was running out.

"All back, ready to go out!"

Ye Tian informed the others to the Dao Realm.

After a while, these supreme realms came, and none of them were defective.

They can't let their origins be damaged for the sake of a little resource.

Swish!

Many supreme realms came out together, and just after they came out, the leaves were completely turned into ashes, and the timing was very accurate.
